title: Good looking better MC
description: Client part of BonumLudios "Good looking better MC" letsplay modpack
body:
Client side part of "Good looking better MC" modpack used in [BonumLudio's](https://www.youtube.com/@BonumLudio_) letsplay

Modpack based on visual improvements and comfortableness, for best game experience

For better experience reccomended download last Bliss shader from oficial github, and "Fresh Animations Extensions" from curseforge :)

External resources:
Resourcepack VanillaTweaks_r272190 was downloaded from [vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) official page
